MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Fri, 24 May 2024 02:47:25 -0700
Subject: Biden hosts a state dinner for Kenya, with a cameo from Obama
Message-ID: <66506230.170a0220.c7255.4795SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADLOXIHOFX6N64VKKENGT4GAZ6HUJFPUT5OCXTQ3KF4VEO6L737JTQICC4RTI4KWQ7CLISBI2E7CGJ2R5ZWBV3UHRXZEKHBIMTNANAUKR7WIAN6UNMJO7TQFHGDBK32J4Z7UUROLFQYNYW4FWYNRXPFLEGS6YIWUZZ3QKJYFFK7Q2H2XQ2BOQ&d=AIAACSXOTSYNMWQWICUBI5OJD2H4FYJLUITHSH3GSGSCKV4FCZQHOF7UVX4MMPL7HOY53IWHVL72Y2FUTYTZJYEBYPHR7LNRFAH76XIEAGISXNLVHSZYOR3XP2LHJXQVNDFJYQU3G34W5NPZSRISV745BO3WBYJ3HZLJX6JBTZK6KFH6GDOBUDGG4TOC43A5BNLJHNBS2L4IYRPTEU&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADU4VVTQLYEHIBPKXZJSUGH37V6F7N77BT2AFBF2432ICMNGVUFTQGDE67MIGUWNDCDT2Z3I2TTSQKPXVUEV4YFX45YWRJ2EJXA6PHZABMBHV5XYD7E2UHC4GJBQQMA7V3OCXQNHRGDT6ALIVXJA5TSXHUSRTEQT3KG3HFRXYE3T72DGGILPY&d=AIAAC3UFQDVQ4CM3LBRX27CUZTTIJCKYRTZMRB5UT5KBXX5HRW64RYOOWHUDQHA4HVHLL4JBG2QSIQ6JTQ5SY7HKFZJX3LTJJXZUGLSP4KG36FWWZJ3DAMXZHR7EEL6TBC5UXQL7VXW47BV5BLNZDWZYUIMN5TIOVB7KIBUC3I3N5WGP2U2GPEZV&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAC2COPTNUYUK62NELVICUUTJ3ZQWS66VAQ6Z4RJIX4NBG7DZYHYZSR4TPFIOEGHSGRIXYFE5EGAGDNQOFIUSJHUHZQMRZJVZTUP2QQ5RUCLSZSVEVJEJ44RNQYQERCVM4MNRQCJHS5INQ64EJ463WBT3NH5HFRQOZRRFBDYBGQS2AYNPGLSBU&d=AIAAC4KDZVUW5YFSYGBUWSEUQ7Z3NQHVAT5ZSDEZ5FFKILQXCUGZ7SWDNGBCHF2M7GLTCSRYL7QC2OERECTMTMMKF4RDSEK2EV4WJNA4YK6H7U7XPOE3HXAPISF75XPCOB6EBT3HXON25QUHRABBL6PUSPKKPOUWB4K4ZAVLNXU2VM5WQDJVCFRN&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
        <!-- @Subject: Biden hosts a state dinner for Kenya, with a cameo from Obama -->
